penicillin.label: Penicillin / beta-lactam antibiotics
penicillin.description: This medication is in the penicillin or related beta-lactam antibiotic class.
penicillin.management: People with penicillin allergy may react to this drug. Confirm with your physician or allergist before taking.

cephalosporin.label: Cephalosporin antibiotics
cephalosporin.description: This medication is a cephalosporin antibiotic. Cross-reactivity with penicillin allergy is possible in some people.
cephalosporin.management: Discuss your allergy history with your prescriber or pharmacist before use.

sulfa.label: Sulfonamide (sulfa) drugs
sulfa.description: This medication may contain a sulfonamide component.
sulfa.management: Sulfa allergy reactions vary. Do not start without guidance from a clinician who knows your history.

aspirin_nsaid.label: Aspirin / NSAID class
aspirin_nsaid.description: This medication is an NSAID or salicylate related to aspirin.
aspirin_nsaid.management: NSAID or aspirin sensitivity can cause rash, asthma, or stomach bleeding. Ask before use.

codeine_opioid.label: Codeine / opioid-related
codeine_opioid.description: This medication is an opioid or codeine-related product.
codeine_opioid.management: Codeine or opioid intolerance can cause nausea, rash, or breathing issues. Use only with medical supervision.

fluoroquinolone.label: Fluoroquinolone antibiotics
fluoroquinolone.description: This medication is in the fluoroquinolone antibiotic class.
fluoroquinolone.management: Report prior fluoroquinolone reactions to your prescriber before starting.

macrolide.label: Macrolide antibiotics
macrolide.description: This medication is a macrolide antibiotic (e.g. azithromycin, erythromycin).
macrolide.management: Discuss prior macrolide reactions with your clinician.

ace_inhibitor.label: ACE inhibitor
ace_inhibitor.description: This medication is an ACE inhibitor used for blood pressure or heart failure.
ace_inhibitor.management: ACE inhibitors can cause cough or swelling. Prior reactions should be reviewed with your doctor.

iodine_contrast.label: Iodine-containing medication
iodine_contrast.description: Some forms of this drug or related products contain iodine.
iodine_contrast.management: Tell radiology and prescribing clinicians about iodine or contrast allergies.

insulin.label: Insulin products
insulin.description: This medication is an insulin product.
insulin.management: Insulin allergies are uncommon but serious. Only use under medical direction.
